_comment: Optional. Map a filename to a caption. Files without an entry use a prettified filename.
emberheart-aerial.png: The Kingdom of EmberHeart — a single living hearth burning in a dead world.
emberheart-gate.png: The Ironwood Gate — the cold and the lost come in to the warm dark.
kaelrath-kryoss.png: The North Wall — the Flamekeeper and his queen face Kryoss, Herald of the Empty Throne.
kaelrath-portrait.png: Kaelrath Emberhide, the God-Ascendant Flamekeeper — the brand, the strand, the ring, and the void-scar.
emberglass-panoply.png: The Vision — the ember-glass panoply: obsidian steel, dragon's gold, sun stone, and the colossi's sacrifice.
emberheart-vault.png: The Ember-Vault — the EmberHeart, Sol-Thairn's flame, and the anchored domains.
